creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 223152
homura-5.4

Hello,

an update to 5.4:

Changes:

- Improved using CLI usage a bit
- Fixed some issues in the Tinkering section
- Disabled wine debug messages in GUI mode
- Homura now tells Wine to not mess up the desktop environment settings by disabling winemenubuilder.exe
- If curl is installed it will be used overwise fetch from the base system will be used.
- Added the option to enable temporary the Gallium HUD
- Added the option to enable temporary the environment variable mesa_gltheard. (For me information take a look at: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/wiki/Performance_impact_of_Mesa_glthread)

Package changes:

- Marked broken for 13 & 14 since the packed i386-wine-(devel) no longer works properly on 13 and does not work at all on 14, i do recommend using games/linux-steam-utils for gaming instead. For more information: https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=50257

- The short package description defined a little more precisely

Many thanks in advance!
